title: Alphabet-owned robotics software company Intrinsic joins Google
description: Nearly five years after graduating into an independent Alphabet company, Intrinsic is moving under Google's domain.
content: Nearly five years after graduating into an independent Alphabet company, Intrinsic is moving under Google's domain.
